title: Kelvin's Better Player Animations (Port)
description: 1.20.x port of Kelvin's Better Player Animations.
body:
This is a port of Kelvin's Better Player Animations to Minecraft 1.20.x.

From CurseForge:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tJwqF3JJxsY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

"Are you tired of the boring, stiff default player animations?  Well do I have news for you!
Introducing Better Player Animations!
 
This mod uses KosmX's PlayerAnimator mod to overhaul Minecraft's default animations to add more life into the game!"

Original CurseForge page: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kelvins-better-player-animations

This project will be taken down if the original project owner requests it.
